sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ السَّفَرُ المُنْفَرِدُ رِحْلَةً لِاكْتِشَافِ الذَّاتِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَكُونَ لِاكْتِشَافِ الأَمَاكِنِ الجَدِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Solo putovanje se smatra putovanjem samootkrivanja prije nego otkrivanjem novih mjesta.
sentences.translationEn: Solo travel is considered a journey of self-discovery before it is about discovering new places.

sentences.arabic: حِينَمَا يَقُودُ المَرْءُ نَفْسَهُ عَبْرَ مَطَارَاتٍ غَرِيبَةٍ وَمُدُنٍ لَا يَعْرِفُ لُغَتَهَا، فَإِنَّهُ يَكْتَسِبُ ثِقَةً لَا مَثِيلَ لَهَا.
sentences.translation: Kada osoba vodi samu sebe kroz nepoznate aerodrome i gradove čiji jezik ne poznaje, stiče neusporedivo samopouzdanje.
sentences.translationEn: When a person leads themselves through strange airports and cities whose language they do not know, they gain unparalleled confidence.

sentences.arabic: تَتَطَلَّبُ هَذِهِ التَّجْرِبَةُ قُدْرَةً عَالِيَةً عَلَى التَّخْطِيطِ وَالتَّكَيُّفِ مَعَ الظُّرُوفِ الطَّارِئَةِ بِمُرُونَةٍ وَذَكَاءٍ.
sentences.translation: Ovo iskustvo zahtijeva visoku sposobnost planiranja i prilagođavanja hitnim okolnostima s fleksibilnošću i inteligencijom.
sentences.translationEn: This experience requires a high ability to plan and adapt to emergency circumstances with flexibility and intelligence.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا أَنَّ الِانْعِزَالَ عَنِ المُحِيطِ المَأْلُوفِ يَفْتَحُ آفَاقًا جَدِيدَةً لِلتَّفْكِيرِ وَتَقْيِيمِ الأَوْلَوِيَّاتِ الشَّخْصِيَّةِ بَعِيدًا عَنْ ضُغُوطِ الحَيَاةِ اليَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Također, izolacija od poznatog okruženja otvara nove vidike za razmišljanje i procjenu ličnih prioriteta daleko od pritisaka svakodnevnog života.
sentences.translationEn: Furthermore, isolation from the familiar environment opens new horizons for thinking and evaluating personal priorities away from the pressures of daily life.

sentences.arabic: وَرُغْمَ أَنَّ بَعْضَ النَّاسِ يَخْشَوْنَ الوَحْدَةَ، إِلَّا أَنَّهُمْ سُرْعَانَ مَا يَجِدُونَ أَنْفُسَهُمْ يُكَوِّنُونَ صَدَاقَاتٍ عَابِرَةً مَعَ مُسَافِرِينَ آخَرِينَ.
sentences.translation: Iako se neki ljudi plaše samoće, ubrzo se nađu u stvaranju prolaznih prijateljstava s drugim putnicima.
sentences.translationEn: Although some people fear loneliness, they soon find themselves making fleeting friendships with other travelers.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ هَذَا النَّوْعَ مِنَ المَغَامَرَاتِ يَصْقُلُ الشَّخْصِيَّةَ وَيَمْنَحُ الإِنْسَانَ مَنْظُورًا عَالَمِيًّا شَامِلًا.
sentences.translation: Ova vrsta avanture brusi ličnost i daje čovjeku sveobuhvatnu globalnu perspektivu.
sentences.translationEn: This type of adventure refines the character and grants the individual a comprehensive global perspective.
